parameters.jsCode:
const job = $('Extract Full Description').item.json;

return [{ json: {
  job_id: job.job_id,
  job_url_hash: job.job_url_hash,
  title: job.title,
  company_name: job.company_name,
  company_url: job.company_url || '',
  company_website: job.company_website || '',
  location: job.location || '',
  remote_policy: job.remote_policy || '',
  salary: job.salary || '',
  contract_type: job.contract_type || '',
  search_keywords: job.search_keywords || '',
  job_url: job.job_url || '',
  full_description: (job.description || '').slice(0, 10000),
  company_summary: 'No company website found',
  company_research_str: JSON.stringify({ company_summary: 'No company website found', products: [], customers: [], values: [], technical_signals: [], hiring_signals: [], keywords: [], scraped_urls: [], discovery: { sitemap_source: 'none', sitemap_urls_found: 0, map_urls_found: 0, total_discovered: 0, pages_scraped: 0 } }),
  job_pdf_url: job.job_pdf_url || '',
  status: 'enriched',
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
} }];

const job = $json;
return [{ json: { ...job, scrape_url: job.job_url || job.apply_url || '' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_job_id: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.job_id, p_title: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.title, p_company_name: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.company_name, p_location: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.location, p_industry: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.industry, p_status: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.status, p_fit_score: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.fit_score, p_content: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.content, p_metadata: $("Prepare Vector Data").item.json.metadata, p_embedding: $json.data[0].embedding }) }}
